title: Civilization VI
description: Build an empire to stand the test of time.
fun_fact: If you played every possible game of Civ 6, there are more potential combinations than atoms in the universe!

title: Total War: Warhammer III
description: Command fantasy armies in massive battles.
fun_fact: The combined Immortal Empires map is the largest in Total War history.

title: Crusader Kings III
description: Rule a medieval dynasty through generations.
fun_fact: Players have created wild stories of incest, murder, and political intrigue.

title: Europa Universalis IV
description: Guide a nation through centuries of history.
fun_fact: The game has over $300 of DLC but is constantly updated.

title: Stellaris
description: Build a galactic empire among the stars.
fun_fact: You can play as machine intelligences, hive minds, or even space snails.

title: Hearts of Iron IV
description: Command nations during World War II.
fun_fact: Players routinely rewrite history in wild alternate scenarios.

title: Victoria 3
description: Guide a nation through the Victorian era.
fun_fact: The economic simulation is so detailed it models individual goods and factories.

title: Age of Empires IV
description: Classic RTS gameplay with modern polish.
fun_fact: Features documentary-style videos about real historical events.

title: Age of Mythology: Retold
fun_fact: The original was a spinoff of Age of Empires with a devoted fanbase.

title: StarCraft II
fun_fact: Professional StarCraft players can perform over 300 actions per minute.

title: Company of Heroes 3
fun_fact: Features a dynamic campaign map where you make strategic decisions.

title: Homeworld 3
fun_fact: The original Homeworld pioneered fully 3D RTS gameplay in space.

title: Frostpunk 2
description: Lead society in a frozen world.
fun_fact: The game forces impossible moral choices about survival and freedom.

title: Frostpunk
description: Build the last city on Earth.
fun_fact: The 'child labor' law sparked real debates about survival ethics.

title: Cities: Skylines II
description: Build the city of your dreams.
fun_fact: The traffic AI simulates every single vehicle in the city individually!

title: Cities: Skylines
description: The city builder that replaced SimCity.
fun_fact: The mod community has created over 100,000 custom assets.

title: Planet Coaster 2
description: Build the ultimate theme park with water parks.
fun_fact: Players have recreated real-world roller coasters with incredible accuracy.

title: Planet Zoo
fun_fact: Animals have over 30 unique behaviors based on real zoological research.

title: Jurassic World Evolution 2
fun_fact: Paleontologists consulted on accurate dinosaur behaviors and sounds.

title: Two Point Campus
fun_fact: The game's humor is inspired by British comedy like Monty Python.

title: Two Point Hospital
fun_fact: Spiritual successor to Theme Hospital from 1997.

title: Prison Architect 2
fun_fact: The original was inspired by Dwarf Fortress's complexity.

title: RimWorld
description: Manage a colony on a distant planet.
fun_fact: The AI storyteller system was inspired by the concept of a dungeon master in tabletop RPGs.

title: Dwarf Fortress
fun_fact: Developed by two brothers for over 20 years, it inspired countless games.

title: Oxygen Not Included
fun_fact: The physics simulation is so accurate it could be used for education!

title: Factorio
fun_fact: The game spent 4 years in Early Access and has a 96% positive rating on Steam!

title: Satisfactory
fun_fact: The conveyor belt system alone took over a year to perfect for smooth gameplay.

title: Dyson Sphere Program
description: Build a Dyson sphere around a star.
fun_fact: Made by a tiny Chinese studio, it sold 2 million copies.

title: Shapez 2
fun_fact: The minimalist design focuses purely on the joy of optimization.

title: Mindustry
fun_fact: Completely free and open source on some platforms.

title: Kerbal Space Program
fun_fact: Real NASA engineers use this game to teach orbital mechanics!

title: Kerbal Space Program 2
description: The next generation of space exploration.
fun_fact: Features interstellar travel and colony building.

title: Space Engineers
fun_fact: The physics engine allows for realistic destruction and construction.

title: Stormworks
description: Build rescue vehicles and save lives.
fun_fact: Features a visual programming system for vehicle logic.

title: Teardown
description: Destroy everything to plan the perfect heist.
fun_fact: The voxel destruction system allows for complete environmental demolition.

title: Besiege
fun_fact: Players have created flying machines, cars, and even computers.

title: Trailmakers
fun_fact: Features a drag-and-drop building system that's surprisingly deep.

title: Main Assembly
fun_fact: Uses a visual programming language for robot behavior.

title: Poly Bridge 3
description: Build bridges that hopefully don't collapse.
fun_fact: Watching bridges fail spectacularly is half the fun.

title: Opus Magnum
description: Build alchemical machines to solve puzzles.
fun_fact: The histograms let you compare your solutions to other players.

title: Infinifactory
fun_fact: Made by the creator of SpaceChem and features dark humor.

title: Shenzhen I/O
description: Program circuits in a Chinese factory.
fun_fact: Includes a fictional solitaire game as a bonus.

title: Exapunks
fun_fact: Set in a 90s-inspired cyberpunk world with zines.

title: Human Resource Machine
description: Teach an office worker to program.
fun_fact: Made by the creators of World of Goo and Little Inferno.

title: 7 Billion Humans
fun_fact: Sequel to Human Resource Machine with parallel processing.

title: SpaceChem
fun_fact: Considered one of the hardest puzzle games ever made.

title: The Talos Principle 2
description: Philosophical puzzles in a robot world.
fun_fact: Explores what it means to be human through robot society.

title: The Talos Principle
fun_fact: Made by the creators of Serious Sam in a complete genre shift.

title: Antichamber
fun_fact: Spaces connect in non-Euclidean ways that break your brain.

title: Superliminal
fun_fact: Objects become the size they appear, creating optical illusions.

title: Maquette
description: Recursive puzzles within a love story.
fun_fact: Objects placed in the center model affect the larger world.

title: Viewfinder
description: Place photos to create new realities.
fun_fact: The photo manipulation mechanics are based on real projective geometry!

title: Patrick's Parabox
description: Push boxes inside boxes inside boxes.
fun_fact: Boxes can contain the level you're currently in.

title: Stephen's Sausage Roll
description: Cook sausages in the hardest puzzle game.
fun_fact: Considered one of the most difficult puzzle games ever created.

title: The Case of the Golden Idol
fun_fact: Players solve a mystery spanning 50 years of a family's history.

title: Chants of Sennaar
fun_fact: The game requires you to actually decode multiple fictional languages!

title: Return of the Obra Dinn
description: Solve the mystery of a ghost ship.
fun_fact: Creator Lucas Pope spent 5 years developing this game entirely by himself.

title: Disco Elysium
fun_fact: The game started as a tabletop RPG that the developers played for years before making it into a video game.

title: Baldur's Gate 3
description: The ultimate D&D video game experience.
fun_fact: Players have found over 17,000 possible endings based on all the choices you can make!

title: Divinity: Original Sin 2
description: Deep tactical RPG with incredible freedom.
fun_fact: The game has over 1 million words of dialogue - more than the entire Harry Potter series!

title: Pillars of Eternity II
description: Sail and explore in this deep RPG.
fun_fact: Features a fully customizable ship and crew management.

title: Pathfinder: Wrath of the Righteous
description: Lead a crusade against demon armies.
fun_fact: Features mythic paths that transform your character into powerful beings.

title: Wasteland 3
fun_fact: The game's dark humor contrasts with serious post-apocalyptic themes.

title: Solasta: Crown of the Magister
fun_fact: One of the most accurate D&D 5E rule implementations.

title: Gloomhaven
fun_fact: Based on one of the highest-rated board games ever made.

title: Persona 5 Royal
description: Live a double life as a student thief.
fun_fact: The game's soundtrack has been streamed over 1 billion times on Spotify!

title: Persona 4 Golden
description: Solve a murder mystery in rural Japan.
fun_fact: Considered by many to have the best story in the Persona series.

title: Persona 3 Reload
description: The Dark Hour awaits in this remake.
fun_fact: Features the darkest themes in the modern Persona series.

title: Shin Megami Tensei V: Vengeance
fun_fact: The parent series to Persona with darker themes.

title: Dragon Quest XI S
fun_fact: Features a 2D mode that recreates the 16-bit era.

title: Yakuza: Like a Dragon
description: A former yakuza becomes an RPG hero.
fun_fact: The protagonist imagines battles as RPG combat because he loves Dragon Quest.

title: Like a Dragon: Infinite Wealth
description: Journey to Hawaii in this crime RPG.
fun_fact: Features a full Animal Crossing-style life simulation mode.

title: Final Fantasy VII Rebirth
description: Continue Cloud's journey in the remake trilogy.
fun_fact: The Remake trilogy will span 3 full games for the original's story!

title: Final Fantasy XVI
description: A mature Final Fantasy with action combat.
fun_fact: This is the first mainline FF game to be fully action-based combat.

title: Tales of Arise
fun_fact: The most visually stunning Tales game ever made.

title: Ni no Kuni II
description: Build a kingdom in a Ghibli-inspired world.
fun_fact: Features kingdom building alongside traditional RPG gameplay.

title: Xenoblade Chronicles 3
description: A massive RPG about life and death.
fun_fact: Combines the worlds of Xenoblade 1 and 2.

title: Fire Emblem: Three Houses
description: Lead a house at a military academy.
fun_fact: Three different routes with completely different perspectives.

title: Monster Hunter Rise
fun_fact: Capcom created entirely new monster ecologies and food chains for the game's ecosystem.

title: Monster Hunter: World
description: The game that brought Monster Hunter worldwide.
fun_fact: Capcom's best-selling game ever with over 20 million copies sold.

title: God Eater 3
fun_fact: Features a transforming weapon that shifts between melee and gun.

title: Toukiden 2
fun_fact: Features Mitama of real historical Japanese figures.

title: Dauntless
fun_fact: Cross-platform play was a priority from the start.

title: Wild Hearts
fun_fact: The Karakuri building system adds unique combat options.

title: NieR: Automata
fun_fact: Director Yoko Taro wore a mask throughout development to stay anonymous.

title: NieR Replicant ver.1.22
fun_fact: Multiple playthroughs reveal entirely new story perspectives.

title: Death Stranding Director's Cut
description: Reconnect a fractured America through deliveries.
fun_fact: Other players' structures appear in your world to help you.

title: Control
description: Lead a secret agency in a shifting building.
fun_fact: The Oldest House literally shifts and changes around you.

title: Alan Wake 2
description: Return to the nightmare 13 years later.
fun_fact: Remedy Entertainment worked on this sequel for over 13 years!

title: Resident Evil 4 Remake
fun_fact: The original RE4 was almost completely different - a scrapped version became Devil May Cry!

title: Dead Space Remake
description: Survive the horrors of the USG Ishimura.
fun_fact: The necromorphs' audio uses slowed-down recordings of actual surgical procedures.

title: Silent Hill 2 Remake
fun_fact: Konami's original team created the monster 'Pyramid Head' in just 2 weeks.

title: Resident Evil Village
fun_fact: Lady Dimitrescu became an internet phenomenon before release.

title: The Callisto Protocol
description: Survive a prison moon of horrors.
fun_fact: Made by the creator of Dead Space.

title: Amnesia: Rebirth
fun_fact: Features a fear system that affects your sanity.

title: SOMA
description: Question consciousness in an underwater facility.
fun_fact: Includes a 'Safe Mode' that removes enemy hostility for story focus.

title: Signalis
description: Classic survival horror with anime aesthetics.
fun_fact: Inspired by PS1-era survival horror and anime.

title: Tormented Souls
fun_fact: A love letter to Resident Evil and Silent Hill.

title: The Outlast Trials
description: Cold War horror experiments with friends.
fun_fact: The developers research actual CIA psychological experiments for inspiration.

title: Layers of Fear (2023)
description: Combined remake of both Layers of Fear games.
fun_fact: The environment shifts and changes when you're not looking.

title: Little Nightmares II
description: Escape nightmarish worlds with a friend.
fun_fact: The TV enemy in the game represents society's addiction to screens.

title: Little Nightmares III
fun_fact: First game in the series with online co-op.

title: Lies of P
fun_fact: The game is based on the story of Pinocchio but set in a dark, soulslike world.

title: Lords of the Fallen (2023)
description: Traverse between living and dead realms.
fun_fact: Features two interconnected worlds you can shift between.

title: Wo Long: Fallen Dynasty
fun_fact: Made by Team Ninja, creators of Nioh.

title: Nioh 2
fun_fact: Features over 30 weapon types and styles.

title: Thymesia
fun_fact: Focuses on aggressive combat with no shields.

title: Steelrising
fun_fact: You play as an automaton fighting for Marie Antoinette.

title: Mortal Shell
fun_fact: Made by a team of only 15 people.

title: Blasphemous 2
fun_fact: The art is inspired by Spanish religious iconography and baroque paintings.

title: Ender Lilies
description: A priestess purifies a cursed kingdom.
fun_fact: Features a hauntingly beautiful piano-driven soundtrack.

title: Salt and Sacrifice
description: Hunt mages in a dying world.
fun_fact: Adds mage hunting and crafting to the Salt formula.

title: Death's Gambit: Afterlife
fun_fact: The Afterlife update essentially remade the entire game.

title: Unsighted
description: Race against time to save android friends.
fun_fact: NPCs die permanently if you don't help them in time.

title: Axiom Verge 2
fun_fact: Made entirely by one person, Tom Happ.

title: Metroid Dread
fun_fact: This game concluded a storyline that began in 1986 - 35 years earlier!

title: Castlevania Advance Collection
fun_fact: Includes three GBA games plus Dracula X.

title: Bloodstained: Ritual of the Night
description: Spiritual successor to Symphony of the Night.
fun_fact: Made by the creator of Symphony of the Night via Kickstarter.

title: Sundered: Eldritch Edition
description: Fight endless hordes in eldritch depths.
fun_fact: Features hand-drawn animation in a procedural world.

title: Grime
description: Absorb enemies in a living world.
fun_fact: The parry mechanic lets you absorb enemy abilities.

title: Prince of Persia: The Lost Crown
fun_fact: First new 2D Prince of Persia in decades.

title: Narita Boy
fun_fact: Heavily inspired by 80s tech aesthetics and Tron.

title: Iconoclasts
description: A mechanic fights against a theocracy.
fun_fact: Made by one developer over 8 years.

title: Laika: Aged Through Blood
fun_fact: Inspired by Mad Max with motorcycle-based combat.

title: Animal Well
fun_fact: Contains secrets so deep the community is still discovering them.
